name: try
description: A fresh new folder for every vibe
author: cprecioso

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

commands.name: try
commands.title: Try
commands.subtitle: Create or open a scratchpad project
commands.description: Displays a menu to select a previously-created scratchpad project, or create a new one

preferences.title: Projects folder
preferences.description: Where to create and look for projects
